# EventReporter documentation

> Canonical documentation for EventReporter 26.07.

## Event ID reference

- Human-readable index: https://www.eventreporter.com/files/manual/eventreporterspecific/event-id-reference/index.html
- Machine-readable Event ID catalog: https://www.eventreporter.com/files/manual/event-ids.json
- Documentation sitemap: https://www.eventreporter.com/files/manual/sitemap.xml

The Event ID reference covers product-generated Windows Application Event Log
diagnostics. It excludes events collected from other providers and user-selected
IDs emitted by the Write to Windows Event Log action.
